name: Greek Mythology Trivia
description: 47 questions spanning the Olympian gods, legendary heroes, monsters, the Underworld, the Trojan War, and famous myths — illustrated with Wikimedia artworks (Caravaggio, Botticelli, Titian, and more).

name: European History & Geography Trivia
description: 42 questions spanning Ukraine, the Baltic States, Lithuania, Poland, Germany, France, and Britain — capitals, key dates, famous firsts, and fun facts. Ends with a self-rating slider.

name: Splunk AI — AI Toolkit, DSDL, MCP & Hosted Models
description: 34 questions covering the Splunk AI Toolkit (formerly MLTK), DSDL, Splunk MCP Server, Splunk Hosted AI Models, and the DSTA LLM-chat integration.

name: Splunk SOAR — Orchestration, Automation & Response
description: 24 questions covering Splunk SOAR fundamentals: the SOAR acronym, MTTD/MTTR impact, apps/assets/containers/artifacts/labels, Visual Playbook Editor blocks (Action, Decision, Format), REST + Python Playbook APIs, Input playbooks, and the Action Builder beta. Sourced from the Splunk SOAR product brief, the SOAR Quick Reference Guide, and help.splunk.com.

name: Sample — All Question Types
description: One question of every supported type: single answer, multiple answers, yes/no, free text, and slider. Use this to explore how each type looks and behaves.

name: Splunk Basics
description: 15 questions covering Splunk fundamentals: components, ports, SPL commands, data lifecycle, and forwarder types. Great for onboarding.

name: Splunk4Champions — Advanced Topics
description: 20 questions covering search performance, tstats, bucket lifecycle, Dashboard Studio, Metrics, and SmartStore. Based on the Splunk4Champions workshop.

name: Splunk4Champions2 — Full Workshop Quiz
description: 42 questions covering the complete Splunk4Champions2 workshop: bucket internals, data pipeline, search modes, tstats, metrics, XML dashboards, Dashboard Studio, tokens, drilldown, Phyphox, and Analytics Workspace. Uses all six question types with workshop images.
